✨ About Us

Meet Meerah Abdulrazak

Beautify Your Event by Meerah was founded in 2025 with one passion — to transform ordinary spaces into extraordinary memories. Based in Kinkinau, Kaduna, we specialise in creating stunning, personalised event setups that leave lasting impressions.

From intimate Kamu ceremonies to elegant picnics, naming celebrations and bridal showers — every setup is crafted with love, creativity and attention to detail.

We believe every moment deserves to be beautiful. Let us make yours unforgettable.
